prompt: Write a Ruby script using the AG-UI SDK that starts a run, streams a text message containing 'Hello, World!', and then finishes the run successfully.
assertions: The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::TextMessageStartEvent, TextMessageContentEvent, and TextMessageEndEvent with matching message_id
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Core::Events::RunFinishedEvent at the end
The code uses AgUiProtocol::Encoder::EventEncoder to encode events and writes them to a stream
